content.definition: Meeting minutes, agenda, or decision-record content.
Policy, regulation, guidance, or normative-rule content.
Procurement notice, tender, or award content.

management.definition: Deterministic schema identity tag for general_doc.
Deterministic schema identity tag for meeting_doc.
Deterministic schema identity tag for policy_doc.
Deterministic schema identity tag for procurement_doc.
Deterministic mapping/content template version identity tag.

quality.definition: Every evaluated chunk source link resolves to a canonical block anchor.
Every evaluated chunk declares canonical source block identifiers.
